name: Cuspajs
recipeInstructions:
1. Select 1 firm head of green cabbage and 1 green pepper.
2. Cut the cabbage into large cubes.
3. Place the cabbage cubes in a large soup pot and cover with water, ensuring it is barely covered.
4. Halve the green pepper and place on top of the cabbage.
5. Salt to taste and bring to a boil until tender.
6. Add 2 cups of cubed potatoes and cook until they are tender.
7. Pour over Zafrig and simmer for 10 minutes.
